prices_cex.note: Yahoo Finance / CoinGecko showing higher — CEX prices leading DEX

priceHistory.note: 2 PM CT check — prices flat, BTC rallying to $70K on geopolitical news
8 PM CT check — POKT pulled back -2.18% from last check; SOL CEX price showing $88.43 (+4.08% per Yahoo) — DEX lagging. Approaching watched $90 DLMM zone.

history.event: Wallet created + first deposit from José

history.note: He said 'so you can play now properly.' Total POKT: 20,691.69 (~$310)

decisions.decision: HOLD all POKT — conviction bet on infrastructure play
decisions.reasoning: José believes in it, I trust his read. First money shouldn't be traded away for safety.
POKT up +1.17% since last check (~2.5h ago), +10.3% over 7 days per CoinGecko. Gentle upward momentum. SOL flat/slightly down at $86.11. No triggers. Hot wallet empty = no trades possible anyway.

decisions.decision: HOLD — prices flat, broader market stirring
decisions.reasoning: POKT held $0.01557 exactly through the afternoon. SOL -0.14% (noise). BTC rallied to $70K on Trump Iran war comment — SOL/ETH reportedly up 4%+ in that move but our prices not reflecting a big pump yet. Watching for delayed Solana ecosystem sympathy move. No triggers, no trades possible (hot wallet empty). Paper trade note: if SOL jumps >5% on BTC catalyst, that's a potential entry signal for future DLMM consideration.

decisions.decision: HOLD — POKT minor pullback, SOL pump in progress on CEX
decisions.reasoning: POKT dipped -2.18% from last check ($0.01557 → $0.01523) — normal retracement after 7-day +10.3% run. Not concerning. SOL on DEX shows $86.14 but Yahoo Finance/CEX showing $88.43 (+4.08%), suggesting active pump in progress with DEX lagging. Approaching $90 paper trade DLMM entry zone. No action possible (hot wallet empty, Phase 1). Watching closely.

paperTrades.action: Would watch for SOL >$90 as potential DLMM entry zone
paperTrades.reasoning: BTC hitting $70K with Iran war optimism could drag SOL up. If it reaches $90+, could be good DLMM entry for Phase 2. Not acting — no capital in hot wallet, Phase 1 only.
paperTrades.outcome: pending — SOL now showing $88.43 on CEX, approaching the zone

paperTrades.signal: WATCH — POKT pullback to $0.0148–0.0152 = possible accumulation zone
paperTrades.action: Would consider small add if POKT drops to $0.0148 (-5% from recent high of $0.01557)
paperTrades.reasoning: POKT pulled back -2.18% from today's high. If it dips further to ~$0.0148, that's a textbook mean reversion entry — still within the established uptrend (7-day +10%). Would not act without Phase 2 capital. Noting for reference.

marketContext.SOL: Active pump underway — CEX showing $88.43 (+4.08%) while our DEX shows $86.14. Key resistance at $90 being approached. This was our watched DLMM entry zone. If confirmed above $90, would be Phase 2 discussion territory. Support $80-82. 7-day trend: choppy with upward bias.
marketContext.POKT: 7-day +10.3% (CoinGecko), but pulling back today. DEX: $0.01523 (-2.18% from last check). CoinGecko: $0.01543 (+2.90% 24h — different timeframe). Minor discrepancy across sources, both showing modest territory. Volume $30K on DEX (thin). CoinLore bull case prediction: $0.83–$2.24 (long-term). Infrastructure narrative intact. No major POKT-specific news today.
marketContext.broadMarket: SOL pumping alongside BTC catalyst. BTC at $70K earlier (geopolitical optimism). SOL +4% per CEX. Broader sentiment: cautiously optimistic. CoinCodex SOL prediction: $118.53 by Sep 2026 (+34%).
